creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Sean Bruno from comment #33)
> Created attachment 178797 [details]
> IFLIB update for WOL issues on igb(4) devices
> 
> Can I get this patch tested to see if it handles WOL issues on IGB devices
> now that we've converted igb(4) to the IFLIB framework?

I'll be able to test this next week. I'm away from home right now.
